message:
refactor(widgets,demo): extract generic DiagnosticSupport and consolidate diagnostic initialization

Diagnostics Infrastructure:
- Add DiagnosticHookDispatch<E> trait for telemetry hook collections that
  can observe diagnostic entries of type E
- Add generic DiagnosticSupport<E, H> struct that encapsulates optional
  DiagnosticLog + optional hooks, providing record(), set_log(), set_hooks(),
  log(), and log_mut() methods
- This replaces the pattern of carrying separate diagnostic_log and
  telemetry_hooks Option fields in each widget

Mouse Playground:
- Replace separate diagnostic_log: Option<DiagnosticLog> and
  telemetry_hooks: Option<TelemetryHooks> with unified
  diagnostics: DiagnosticSupport<DiagnosticEntry, TelemetryHooks>
- Implement DiagnosticHookDispatch<DiagnosticEntry> for TelemetryHooks
- Add Debug impl for TelemetryHooks
- Rename dispatch() to dispatch_entry() to avoid conflict with trait method

Demo Showcase:
- Add init_showcase_diagnostics() that centralizes startup-time env-gated
  diagnostics bootstrapping across all screens, called during AppModel::new()

Cell Attrs:
- Remove unused merged_flags() method from CellAttrs

Inspector/Widgets:
- Integrate diagnostic support infrastructure into inspector and widget
  modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
